  1. com.github.oshi.ffm
  2. oshi.ffm

Uses of Package
oshi.ffm

Packages that use oshi.ffm
Package
Description
oshi.ffm
Provides FFM access to system libraries and cross-platform utilities
  • Classes in oshi.ffm used by oshi.ffm
    Class
    Description
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaBooleanCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns a boolean.
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns an object.
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaDoubleCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns a double.
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaIntCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns an int.
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaLongCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns a long.
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaRunnable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and does not return a value.
    NativeHandle
    An AutoCloseable wrapper around a native handle (represented as a MemorySegment).
    NativeHandle.ThrowingCloser
    A consumer that accepts a MemorySegment and may throw.
